llm_plan.reasoning_summary: This itinerary optimizes for a balanced schedule, adhering to the traveler's preferences and constraints. It includes a mix of cultural exploration, dining, and relaxation, ensuring a laid-back yet enriching experience.

days.notes: Day 1 starts with breakfast at Taste of Belgium - OTR. After check-in, visit Spring Grove Cemetery & Arboretum and Smale Riverfront Park. Lunch at The Melting Pot follows, followed by a visit to Greater Cincinnati Police Museum. Dinner returns to Taste of Belgium - OTR.

Day 2 begins with breakfast at Taste of Belgium - OTR. Visit Cincinnati Zoo & Botanical Garden in the morning, followed by lunch at Pepp & Dolores. In the afternoon, explore Cincinnati Art Museum. Dinner returns to Taste of Belgium - OTR.

Day 3 starts with breakfast at Moerlein Lager House. Visit Fountain Square in the morning. Lunch at Five On Vine follows. The return flight departs early, leaving no time for additional attractions or dinner.
